description: Evidence summary visualization for Echs1 GO:0004300 annotation support
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a visualization of the evidence supporting the hypothesis

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 7))

# Panel 1: Catalytic residue conservation heatmap
ax1 = axes[0]
residue_labels = ['Glu144\n(cat. acid)', 'Glu164\n(cat. base)', 'Ala98\n(binding)', 'Asp99\n(binding)', 
                   'Ile100\n(binding)', 'Lys101\n(binding)', 'Gly141\n(binding)']
human_residues = ['E', 'E', 'A', 'D', 'I', 'K', 'G']
drome_residues = ['E', 'E', 'A', 'D', 'I', 'K', 'G']
conservation = [1 if h == d else 0.5 for h, d in zip(human_residues, drome_residues)]

data_matrix = np.array([conservation]).reshape(1, -1)
im = ax1.imshow(data_matrix, cmap='RdYlGn', vmin=0, vmax=1, aspect='auto')
ax1.set_xticks(range(len(residue_labels)))
ax1.set_xticklabels(residue_labels, rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=9)
ax1.set_yticks([0])
ax1.set_yticklabels(['Conservation'])
ax1.set_title('Catalytic/Binding Residue Conservation\n(Human ECHS1 numbering)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Add text annotations
for j in range(len(residue_labels)):
    label = f"H:{human_residues[j]}\nD:{drome_residues[j]}"
    color = 'white' if conservation[j] == 1 else 'black'
    ax1.text(j, 0, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color=color)

# Panel 2: Evidence strength summary
ax2 = axes[1]
evidence_types = [
    'Catalytic residue\nconservation',
    'Domain architecture\n(Pfam/InterPro)',
    'PROSITE active\nsite match',
    'Cross-species\nrescue (in vivo)',
    'Metabolic phenotype\n(methacrylation)',
    'PANTHER subfamily\nclassification',
    'ISS annotation\n(FlyBase manual)',
]
evidence_strength = [5, 5, 5, 4.5, 4, 5, 4]
colors = ['#2d8a4e' if s >= 4.5 else '#6db56d' if s >= 4 else '#a8d4a8' for s in evidence_strength]

bars = ax2.barh(range(len(evidence_types)), evidence_strength, color=colors, edgecolor='#333333', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_yticks(range(len(evidence_types)))
ax2.set_yticklabels(evidence_types, fontsize=9)
ax2.set_xlabel('Evidence Strength (1-5)', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_title('Evidence Supporting GO:0004300\n(enoyl-CoA hydratase activity)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 5.5)
ax2.axvline(x=4, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Strong threshold')

# Add value labels
for bar, val in zip(bars, evidence_strength):
    ax2.text(val + 0.1, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, f'{val}', 
             va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: evidence_summary.png")
